return(function(m,E,P,Y,z,o,H,j,F,A,l,K,v,N,S,g,B,w,i,f,t,a)a,g,A,t,v,f,i,B,l,N,j,w,K,S,F={},function(m)for G=919157+-919156,#m,131697+-131696 do f[m[G]]=(395215-395214)+f[m[G]]end if P then local return(S(8360027-1044441,{}))(E(H))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[G(-961690+965902)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
